description: You are a quantitative analyst at a trading firm. A Python library of technical indicators (EMA, RSI, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown) located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/trading_indicators is producing incorrect trading signals, failing CI, and producing values that deviate from benchmarks. Fix the mathematical bugs in the indicator implementations so that the test suite passes. Do not change function signatures, test files, or input data; only fix the implementation logic. The project is already open in PyCharm.

bug_locations: indicators/rsi.py:relative_strength_index (wrong RS formula — uses subtraction not division)
indicators/stats.py:sharpe_ratio (divides by variance instead of std dev)
indicators/stats.py:max_drawdown (computes wrong running max — uses cummax not rolling peak from start)
metadata.industry: Securities, Commodity Contracts, and Other Financial Investments
